name: part_009
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs 'Bad Apple!!' solo on a stylized 3D stage with shifting black and white patterns.
Transition scene featuring a roulette spin and a board game sequence leading to the next performance.
Aki Rosenthal, Hakui Koyori, and Sakamata Chloe perform 'Magia' together on a magical-themed stage.

subtitles.original: 逃げよう
subtitles.english: I'll run away

subtitles.original: 何も感じず 過ごせばいいの
subtitles.english: I should just spend my time feeling nothing

subtitles.original: 戸惑う言葉 与えられても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm given bewildering words

subtitles.original: 自分の心 ただ上の空
subtitles.english: My heart is just wandering elsewhere

subtitles.original: もし私から 動くのならば
subtitles.english: If I were to make a move

subtitles.original: すべて変えるのなら 黒にする
subtitles.english: If I were to change everything, I'd make it black

subtitles.original: 動くのならば
subtitles.english: If I were to move

subtitles.original: 動くのならば
subtitles.english: If I were to move

subtitles.original: すべて壊すわ
subtitles.english: I'll destroy everything

subtitles.original: すべて壊すわ
subtitles.english: I'll destroy everything

subtitles.original: 悲しむならば
subtitles.english: If I were to grieve

subtitles.original: 悲しむならば
subtitles.english: If I were to grieve

subtitles.original: 私の心 白く変われる？
subtitles.english: Can my heart turn white?

subtitles.original: あなたのことも 私のことも
subtitles.english: About you, about me

subtitles.original: すべてのことも まだ知らないの
subtitles.english: About everything, I still don't know

subtitles.original: 重い瞼を 開けたのならば
subtitles.english: If I were to open these heavy eyelids

subtitles.original: すべて壊すのなら 黒になれ
subtitles.english: If I'm to destroy everything, let it be black

subtitles.original: Magia
subtitles.english: Magia

subtitles.original: いつか君が瞳に灯す愛の光が
subtitles.english: One day, the light of love you light in your eyes

subtitles.original: 時を越えて
subtitles.english: Will cross through time

subtitles.original: 滅び急ぐ世界の夢を 確かに一つ
subtitles.english: And surely destroy one of the dreams...

subtitles.original: 壊すだろう
subtitles.english: ...of this world rushing toward destruction

subtitles.original: 躊躇いを飲み干して
subtitles.english: Drink down your hesitation

subtitles.original: 君が望むものは何？
subtitles.english: What is it that you desire?

subtitles.original: こんな欲深い憧れの行方に
subtitles.english: In the destination of such greedy longings

subtitles.original: 儚い明日はあるの？
subtitles.english: Is there a fleeting tomorrow?

subtitles.original: 子供の頃夢に見てた
subtitles.english: Like the ancient magic...

subtitles.original: 古の魔法のように
subtitles.english: ...I used to dream of as a child

subtitles.original: 闇さえ砕く力で
subtitles.english: With power that can even shatter darkness

subtitles.original: 微笑む君に会いたい
subtitles.english: I want to meet you smiling

subtitles.original: 震えるこの手の中には
subtitles.english: In these trembling hands...

subtitles.original: 手折られた花の勇気
subtitles.english: ...lies the courage of a plucked flower

subtitles.original: 想いだけが頼るすべて
subtitles.english: Our feelings are all we can rely on

subtitles.original: 光を呼び覚ます願い
subtitles.english: A wish that awakens the light

subtitles.original: いつか君も誰かのために
subtitles.english: One day, you too will probably...

subtitles.original: 強い力を望むのだろう
subtitles.english: ...desire great power for someone's sake

subtitles.original: 愛が胸を捕らえた夜に
subtitles.english: On a night when love captures your heart

subtitles.original: 未知の言葉が生まれて来る
subtitles.english: Unknown words will be born

subtitles.original: 迷わずに行けるのなら
subtitles.english: If I can go without hesitation

subtitles.original: 心が砕けてもいいわ
subtitles.english: It's fine if my heart breaks

subtitles.original: いつも目の前の悲しみに
subtitles.english: I want a spell to stand against...

subtitles.original: 立ち向かうための呪文が欲しい
subtitles.english: ...the sadness always before my eyes

subtitles.original: 君はまだ夢見る記憶
subtitles.english: You are still a dreaming memory

subtitles.original: 私は眠らない明日
subtitles.english: I am a sleepless tomorrow

subtitles.original: 二人が出会う奇跡を
subtitles.english: To seize the miracle...

subtitles.original: 勝ち取るために進むわ
subtitles.english: ...of our encounter, I move forward

subtitles.original: 怯えるこの手の中には
subtitles.english: In these frightened hands...

subtitles.original: 手折られた花の刃
subtitles.english: ...lies the blade of a plucked flower

subtitles.original: 想いだけが生きるすべて
subtitles.english: Our feelings are all we live for

subtitles.original: 心に振りかざす願い
subtitles.english: A wish brandished within the heart
